snippet.title: Nord Sud Ovest Est - La leggendaria storia degli 883 | Teaser Ufficiale
snippet.description:
L’epico finale della storia degli 883 ci porta nel mondo di Nord Sud Ovest Est. Max e Mauro stanno coronando il loro sogno: essere primi in classifica nel 1993. Ma la vita delle popstar a guardarla da dentro è incredibile quanto incasinata. Tra Max e Mauro qualcosa inizia a cambiare: qual è il prossimo sogno? La grande avventura che vivono li porterà nella scintillante Milano della moda, e nell’America che sognavano da ragazzini. Una volta arrivati lì, troveranno veramente se stessi? E ce la faranno a rimanere amici come quando hanno iniziato?

Nord Sud Ovest Est – La leggendaria storia degli 883 | Dal 9 ottobre in esclusiva su Sky, scopri come: https://bit.ly/ytskyit 
#883laserie

snippet.title: Enola Holmes 3 | Trailer ufficiale | Netflix Italia
snippet.description:
Solo una Holmes può salvare un Holmes. Il franchise acclamato dalla critica è tornato e stavolta porta Enola lontano da Londra, dove i sogni personali e professionali si scontrano nel caso più intricato e pericoloso che abbia mai affrontato. Diretto da Philip Barantini (il regista premiato agli Emmy® per "Adolescence"), il film è interpretato da Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill e Helena Bonham Carter. ENOLA HOLMES 3 debutta il 1° LUGLIO, solo su Netflix.

ENOLA HOLMES ed ENOLA HOLMES 2 sono ORA DISPONIBILI.

Guarda su Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886

Iscriviti: https://bit.ly/3989v8H

snippet.title: Cyclops: The Fearless Leader | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Husband. Leader. Mutant. 🕶️

As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind.

Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield.

Cross him and all restraint disappears, unleashing an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!

He's the one in charge for a reason. Find out why as Cyclops arrives with Season 8.5 of Marvel Rivals on June 12th!  💥

snippet.title: Romeo Santos - Imitadora | Letra
snippet.description:
​​🎧 Imitadora - Romeo Santos
🔔 Activa las notificaciones para enterarte de los vídeos nuevos!

👉 Romeo Santos:
https://www.instagram.com/romeosantos/
https://www.facebook.com/RomeoSantosOfficial/

🎤 Lyrics/Letra de "Imitadora"

Hey
Who are you?

Mi memoria ha conservado lo que se ha llevado el viento
Y yo estoy estancado en esos tiempos
Cuando tú me amabas y con gran fulgor sentía tus besos
Dime, quítame esta duda

¿Quién es esta extraña que se ha apoderado de tu ser?
¿Dónde está la amante loca que me erizaba la piel?
Porque ya tú no me tocas como lo hacía esa mujer
Algo no anda bien

Escucha las palabras de Romeo

Esta noche me hago el interrogante
Y le pongo fin a la impostora, usurpadora
Exijo contigo una entrevista
Sospecho plagio a mi señora, mala imitadora

Dime, tengo unas preguntas
¿Dónde fue bajo la lluvia que te di ese primer beso?
Dime también, relátame el momento
Número de alojamiento donde yo te hice mujer

Confírmame
¿Qué me enciende en el se*o?
¿Qué me encanta de tu cuerpo?
Nuestra primera aventura

Quiero detalles
¿Será tu cuello o el ombliguito,
Tu punto favorito?
Porque yo sí sé cual es

Si en verdad eres la original, demuestrámelo ahora

Esta noche me hago el interrogante
Y le pongo fin a la impostora, usurpadora
Exijo contigo una entrevista
Sospecho plagio a mi señora, mala imitadora

Dime, tengo unas preguntas
¿Dónde fue bajo la lluvia que te di ese primer beso?
Dime también, relátame el momento
Número de alojamiento donde yo te hice mujer

Confírmame
¿Qué me enciende en el se*o?
¿Qué me encanta de tu cuerpo?
Nuestra primera aventura

Quiero detalles
¿Será tu cuello o el ombliguito,
Tu punto favorito?
Porque yo sí sé cual es

Si en verdad eres la original, demuéstramelo ahora

Tú no eras así cuando te conocí
The King
Tell me where she's at?

¿Quién es esta imitadora hoy en su lugar?
Tell me where she's at?
Yo la extraño ¿a dónde se me perdió?
Tell me where she's at?
Que regrese mi amada porque tú
No eres tú

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: DJ Chris Bernard - Come back and Stay | #dance #pop Producer HouseWorker
snippet.description:
Der erste Love Song für alle, die nie tanzen wollen. DIESER SONG DIESE NACHT UND NUR WIR - DU WEIẞT ICH MACH DAS NIE DOCH HEUT TANZ ICH MIT DIR!
"Come back and Stay" ist Nachfolger von "Die Engel singen" als englische Version. Lyrik & Melodie by DJ Chris Bernard. 


Have Fun

[Verse 1]
You left your coat by the door
Still smells like rain and smoke
I keep your mug in the sink
Like you might walk in and joke

The chair still faces the light
Your note is folded thin
I read it more than I should
And I let your name sink in

[Pre-Chorus]
Come back and stay
Don't let it fade
I kept the room the same
For better days

[Chorus]
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay
Don't leave me behind

Everything we had together
Still lives in the seams
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay with me

[Verse 2]
Your boots by the front step
Still dusty from that night
I hear your laugh in the hall
Then it's gone by morning light

I tried to let it go
I tried to look ahead
But every corner in this house
Still says the words you said

[Pre-Chorus]
Come back and stay
Don't make me wait
I kept the door unlocked
I kept the faith

[Chorus]
Come back and stay
For good this time
Please stay
